title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at Hexaware Technologies Global Group

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at Hexaware Technologies Global Group
jsonLd.description:
Hexaware Technologies Global Group has an exciting opening for a Software Engineer at our Ranchi office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Hexaware Technologies Global Group:
Hexaware Technologies Global Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Kubernetes

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hexaware Technologies Global Group!
